channel.title: Hourly Kabir Das Dohas
channel.description: Timeless wisdom by Sant Kabir Das

item.title: माटी कहे कुम्हार से, तु क्या रौंदे मोय । एक दिन ऐसा आएगा, मैं रौंदूगी तोय ॥
item.description:
Meaning: The clay says to the potter, 'Why do you trample me? A day will come when I will trample you.'

Translation: Clay says to the potter, why do you knead me? A day will come when I will knead you.
item.guid: माटी कहे कुम्हार से, तु क्या रौंदे मोय । एक दिन ऐसा आएगा, मैं रौंदूगी तोय ॥492916

item.title: ऐसी बानी बोलिए, मन का आपा खोय । औरन को शीतल करे, आपहुं शीतल होय ॥
item.description:
Meaning: Speak such words that you lose your ego. Words that cool the listener and cool yourself.

Translation: Speak such words that you lose your ego. It cools others and cools yourself too.
item.guid: ऐसी बानी बोलिए, मन का आपा खोय । औरन को शीतल करे, आपहुं शीतल होय ॥492917

item.title: पोथी पढ़ि पढ़ि जग मुआ, पंडित भया न कोय । ढाई आखर प्रेम का, पढ़े सो पंडित होय ॥
item.description:
Meaning: Reading books, the world died, no one became wise. One who reads the two and a half letters of 'Love' becomes wise.

Translation: Reading books the world died, none became a scholar. He who reads the two and a half letters of Love, becomes a scholar.
item.guid: पोथी पढ़ि पढ़ि जग मुआ, पंडित भया न कोय । ढाई आखर प्रेम का, पढ़े सो पंडित होय ॥492918
